narrative:
Ney Village (precinct in Defiance County) has 211 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.1%, a clear Republican lean of 11.8 percentage points.
